news.summary: Every match must be played on natural grass that gives players as consistent a surface as possible, no matter the venue. Cue the years of sod studies.

news.headline: Should Switzerland Cap Its Population at 10 Million? Voters Will Decide.

news.headline: China accuses US of power abuse with expanded blacklist of Chinese firms
news.summary:
Beijing has warned of a resolute response to the Pentagon’s newly expanded blacklist of Chinese companies, accusing Washington of using national security as a pretext to curb the development of Chinese firms.
